description: MobiAct Colab XGBoost baseline (128-D RobustScaler, WINDOW_SIZE=128 @ 50 Hz). Copy fall_xgboost_model.pkl, fall_scaler.pkl, adl_xgboost_model.pkl, adl_scaler.pkl, adl_label_encoder.pkl into models/baseline_adl&fall/. Fall subtype (263-D) optional — set artifacts.fall_type when available.
fall_type_pipeline: optional: scripts/baseline_falltype — omit fall_type in manifest to disable
